meta.title: Cookie Policy - Blimpify
meta.description: Learn how Blimpify uses cookies and similar technologies on our websites

introduction.text1: This cookie policy describes how Blimpify AB ("we", "us", "Blimpify") uses cookies and similar technologies on our websites:
introduction.text2: When you use our services, only cookies that are necessary for the websites to function are placed. Analytics cookies are only placed if you actively consent to them via our cookie banner.

whatAreCookies.title: 1. What Are Cookies?
whatAreCookies.intro: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit a website.
whatAreCookies.outro: Some cookies are necessary for our service to work, while others are optional.

ourCookies.title: 2. Cookies We Use
ourCookies.intro: We primarily use necessary and functional cookies.
ourCookies.text: On certain parts of the service, we also use analytics cookies, which are only activated if you give your consent.
ourCookies.outro: We do not use cookies for marketing, advertising, or third-party tracking.

thirdPartyCookies.title: 3. Third-Party Cookies
thirdPartyCookies.intro: Certain cookies or similar technologies may be set by third-party providers we use:
thirdPartyCookies.outro: These technologies are only used for the purposes described in this policy.

consent.title: 4. Consent and Cookie Settings
consent.intro: On your first visit to our public website, a cookie banner is displayed where you can choose:
consent.text1: If you choose "Only necessary", no analytics tools are loaded.
options: change or withdraw your consent via Cookie Settings (if active on the page), or
block cookies directly in your browser.
consent.warning: Note that if you block necessary cookies, certain features — such as login or payments — may stop working correctly.

changes.title: 5. Changes to Cookie Policy
items: We may update this cookie policy as needed, for example if we add new features or change how we use cookies.
The latest version is always available on this page.
Significant changes are communicated via email or in the dashboard.

contact.title: 6. Contact
contact.intro: Have questions about cookies or how we process your personal data?
